arts.sum: Genoa are the team that have scored the fewest goals from outside the box in Serie A this season with their sole goal from distance coming against Bologna in the reverse fixture through Andrea Pinamonti. Bologna have not won at home against Genoa in the top-flight since February 2018, having won just three points and suffered two defeats in the five matches since; the Emilian team only currently have a longer winless streak at home in Serie A only against Napoli (6) and Juventus (22).

arts.ttl: Bologna vs Genoa Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Bologna, sitting in seventh place, host Genoa, who are currently in 13th, in their Serie A match at the Stadio Renato Dall'Ara on Saturday, May 24th, with kick-off scheduled for 17:00 GMT. Both teams ...
